title: LongTail Driving Scenarios with Reasoning Traces: The KITScenes LongTail Dataset
abstract: 在自动驾驶等现实领域，泛化到罕见场景仍是一个根本性挑战。为此，我们推出了一个专为端到端驾驶设计的新数据集，重点关注长尾驾驶事件。我们提供了多视角视频数据、轨迹、高级指令及详细推理轨迹，以促进上下文学习和少样本泛化。由此构建的多模态模型（如视觉语言模型和视觉语言动作模型）基准测试，不仅评估安全性和舒适度指标，还涵盖指令遵循能力及模型输出间的语义连贯性。数据集包含英语、西班牙语和中文的多语言推理轨迹，这些轨迹来自具有多元文化背景的领域专家。因此，我们的数据集为研究不同推理形式如何影响驾驶能力提供了独特资源。数据集访问地址：https://hf.co/datasets/kit-mrt/kitscenes-longtail
preview_text: In real-world domains such as self-driving, generalization to rare scenarios remains a fundamental challenge. To address this, we introduce a new dataset designed for end-to-end driving that focuses on long-tail driving events. We provide multi-view video data, trajectories, high-level instructions, and detailed reasoning traces, facilitating in-context learning and few-shot generalization. The resulting benchmark for multimodal models, such as VLMs and VLAs, goes beyond safety and comfort metrics by evaluating instruction following and semantic coherence between model outputs. The multilingual reasoning traces in English, Spanish, and Chinese are from domain experts with diverse cultural backgrounds. Thus, our dataset is a unique resource for studying how different forms of reasoning affect driving competence. Our dataset is available at: https://hf.co/datasets/kit-mrt/kitscenes-longtail
one_line_summary: 该论文介绍了一个专注于长尾驾驶场景的数据集，包含多模态数据和推理轨迹，旨在评估VLM和VLA等模型在自动驾驶中的指令遵循和语义一致性能力。
